MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Davide Nied, Esq. 415-795-3246 of Ad Astra for Moving party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court announces there was no Opposition and asks Counsel questions. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

AD ASTRA LAW GROUP, LLP, AND ATTY. DAVID NIED'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Granted. 2 Orders are signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/NL)
